posts.author: ilia510 (Ilia Zelenkin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there monday folks!

I wanted to share a workflow that we use ourselves in #marketing . If you know what is Help a reporter out newsletter, then you know how difficult it is to browse through all the questions 3x times per day. You basically give up after a couple of weeks.

But building relationships with a reporter can be game changing, thus, I’ve decided to solve this issue by build a real-time dashboard to track all the queries.

Disclaimer: I am using our own A.I. app to do some things, but the workflow works without it as well.

And a teaser:

Here is the video. Ping me if you need the board, I can share it w/o any issues.
